commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR redesigns the setup/onboarding UI, moves Windows permission review into the capabilities step, adds an env-gated setup preview route, updates setup-scoped accent resources, and includes seven onboarding screenshots.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: the latest after-change screenshots show black text on red setup primary buttons, and the changed XAML shows the intended foreground override. I did not run the WinUI app because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow setup style/resource repair that an automated fix pass can attempt, followed by maintainer review of the broader UX direction.

target.title: Redesign WSL gateway onboarding (stepped, brand-themed, accessible)
target.body:
> **Draft for review/testing.** Presentation-only redesign of the WSL gateway onboarding — **no changes to connection, pairing, the install pipeline, credentials, or the gateway protocol.**

## What this is

A redesign of the OpenClaw setup/onboarding flow with a power-user lens: clearer, fewer clicks, transparent about what gets installed, brand-themed, and theme-aware (light + dark). The gateway-onboard step now reads as a vertical transcript, and the pre-install screen is a short stepped flow that ends in install.

## Try it

```powershell
./build.ps1
$env:OPENCLAW_FORCE_ONBOARDING="1"; ./run-app-local.ps1 -NoBuild -Isolated -AllowNonMaster
```

There's a **dev-only preview route** to jump straight to any screen without a real install:

```powershell
$env:OPENCLAW_SETUP_PREVIEW_PAGE="welcome"   # or: capabilities | progress | wizard | permissions | complete
```

(Env-gated — zero effect when unset.)

## Screens

### 1 · Welcome — chooser
![welcome](https://github.com/bkudiess/openclaw-windows-node/raw/477f49566d205a0aeb4b5ba7ce50cbe5c70443b5/docs/onboarding-redesign/00-welcome.png)

### 2 · Capabilities — stepped flow (steps accrete with checkmarks, like the onboard)
**Step 1 — what your agent can do**
![step1](https://github.com/bkudiess/openclaw-windows-node/raw/477f49566d205a0aeb4b5ba7ce50cbe5c70443b5/docs/onboarding-redesign/01-capabilities-step1.png)

**Step 2 — Windows permissions** (merged in from the old standalone step)
![step2](https://github.com/bkudiess/openclaw-windows-node/raw/477f49566d205a0aeb4b5ba7ce50cbe5c70443b5/docs/onboarding-redesign/02-capabilities-step2.png)

**Step 3 — review & install**
![step3](https://github.com/bkudiess/openclaw-windows-node/raw/477f49566d205a0aeb4b5ba7ce50cbe5c70443b5/docs/onboarding-redesign/03-capabilities-step3.png)

### 3 · Gateway onboard — vertical transcript
![onboard](https://github.com/bkudiess/openclaw-windows-node/raw/477f49566d205a0aeb4b5ba7ce50cbe5c70443b5/docs/onboarding-redesign/04-gateway-onboard.png)

### 4 · Progress — tighter steps + live-activity ledger that flows below them
![progress](https://github.com/bkudiess/openclaw-windows-node/raw/477f49566d205a0aeb4b5ba7ce50cbe5c70443b5/docs/onboarding-redesign/05-progress.png)

### 5 · All set
![complete](https://github.com/bkudiess/openclaw-windows-node/raw/477f49566d205a0aeb4b5ba7ce50cbe5c70443b5/docs/onboarding-redesign/06-complete.png)

## Notable changes

- **Welcome chooser** — Install a local gateway (WSL, recommended) vs. Connect to an existing gateway.
- **Merged permissions** — "Grant permissions" now lives inline on the capabilities screen; each OS permission row shows only when its capability is enabled. The standalone permissions page is dropped from the flow (kept for the preview route).
- **Stepped, accreting capabilities flow** — each step collapses into a green-checkmark summary above the active step, matching the gateway-onboard transcript.
- **Progress** — step rows tightened; the live-activity ledger flows directly below the steps and opens downward instead of being pinned to the window bottom.
- **Brand-red accent**, scoped to the setup window only (light + dark). Filled controls (buttons, radios, checkboxes, toggles) use WCAG-AA reds (white text ≥ 5:1). The bright coral `#FF5C5C` failed AA at 3.03:1, so it's retained only for accent text/links.
- **Shared `SetupPermissionHelper`** used by both surfaces; removed the "what changed / how to undo" expander from the Complete page.

## Validation

- `build.ps1` ✅
- Tests: **SetupEngine 237 · Tray 958 · Shared 2049** — all green, no regressions.

Screenshots are also committed under `docs/onboarding-redesign/` (visible in the Files changed tab).
target.author: bkudiess

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
